creator: gamer@ryppn.com
text:
(In reply to Mel Pilgrim from comment #6)

I've taken onboard your comments that the issue might be closer to home, so I've just whitelisted the problem domains, I wonder if the issue is some misconfiguration with my Netgate gateway which uses unbound. Not a conversation for here really but strange how it only affects certain domains.

 Would be nice to see the version bumped to 2.011 though.
